response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates relevant experience as a Staff Software Engineer with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling roles, including work on MCP code generators. His background in distributed systems (micro-services at Dunnhumby, high-throughput systems) and multi-language expertise (TypeScript, Dlang, Python-like systems) aligns well. However, his lack of explicit distributed systems depth (e.g., scalability metrics, system design at scale) and limited stakeholder management examples slightly reduce his fit for a Staff-level strategy role.
strengths: Hands-on experience with AI-driven code production and agentic workflows (MCP, AI-agent infrastructure)
Proven expertise in distributed systems (micro-services handling millions of requests/sec, low-latency apps)
Strong multi-language adaptability (TypeScript, Node.js, Dlang, Java, C++) and polyglot engineering mindset
concerns: Limited evidence of end-to-end system ownership at Staff-level scale (e.g., incident response, on-call for high-throughput systems)
Minimal explicit stakeholder management or cross-functional coordination in senior roles
No clear examples of technical strategy or driving decisions at scale (more tactical execution focus in past roles)
